class.name: GDKAccessibility
class.description: Provides wrappers for concrete PC GDK accessibility APIs from [code]XAccessibility.h[/code].

method.name: query_closed_caption_properties
method.description: Queries current closed-caption properties via [code]XClosedCaptionGetProperties[/code]. On success, [code]result.data[/code] is a [GDKClosedCaptionProperties] object.

method.name: set_closed_caption_enabled
method.description: Sets whether closed captions are enabled via [code]XClosedCaptionSetEnabled[/code].

method.name: query_high_contrast_mode
method.description: Queries the current high-contrast mode via [code]XHighContrastGetMode[/code]. On success, [code]result.data[/code] contains [code]mode[/code] and [code]mode_name[/code].

method.name: get_high_contrast_mode_name
method.description: Returns a snake_case name for a [enum HighContrastMode] value.

constants.constant: Another high-contrast style not represented by dark or light.
